Class: CircleStyle

bemap.CircleStyle(options)

Base class for CircleStyle.

Constructor

new CircleStyle(options)

Parameters:
Name Type Description
options Object See below the available values.
Properties
Name Type Description
fillColor bemap.Color Set the fill color of the circle with a bemap.Color.
borderColor bemap.Color Set the border color of the circle with a bemap.Color.
borderWidth int Set the border width of the circle in pixels.
borderType bemap.CircleStyle.TYPE define the border type of the circle.
Source:
  • bemap-model/bemap-circleStyle.js, line 16

(static) TYPE

List of available type for the circle style.
Properties:
Name Type Description
DASH
PLANE
DOT
DOT_DASH
